name: Apple Puffed Pancake
recipeIngredient: 2 to 3 tablespoons firmly packed brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. In a blender or large bowl, mix eggs, milk, flour, sugar, vanilla, salt, and cinnamon until blended. If using an electric mixer, the batter will remain slightly lumpy.
3. Melt butter in a 12-inch fluted porcelain quiche dish or a 13-by-9-inch baking dish. Add apple slices and return to oven. Sizzle the butter until it begins to bubble but do not let it brown.
4. Remove the dish from the oven and immediately pour the batter over the apple slices. Sprinkle with brown sugar.
5. Bake in the middle of the oven for 20 minutes or until puffed and brown. Serve immediately.
